title: wulfenia lutea
intro: Wulfenia lutea, also known as golden wulfenia, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
